objective: Prove the Codex-first advisory pilot and its promotion boundary
prefetch: Read the slice plan and listed source files before broader search
constraints: Initial exact cohort is Codex CLI plus one OpenAI-compatible/LiteLLM route through a trusted Codex profile/harness
Supported claims require route-bound live evidence
Planned-tier host-native selection is baseline; public-default next-lower attempts remain gated
Deterministic seeded faults prove correction-handoff refusal and fallback safety but never count as live efficiency benefit
out_of_scope: Public-default next-lower attempts without preregistered promotion evidence
acceptance_criteria: Release evidence distinguishes deterministic proof from absent or later attended live proof
Exploratory and correction-handoff strata prove mechanics and fail-closed dispatch without false savings claims
Insufficient live samples or incomparable metrics produce not-promoted and keep next-lower attempts disabled
An honest no-paid not-promoted artifact passes without implying cohort support
model_tier_reason: Live capability evidence and release claims require strongest review and synthesis
escalation_triggers: Evidence cannot bind exact route and work proof
